overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forest at night. The scene features glowing green wisps floating in the air, starry skies, and transitions from dense woodland to rocky outcrops with magical blue lighting in the distance.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense forest trees and glowing green wisps

Dark silhouetted trees lining the right side of the forest path
Narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
Floating magical green particles scattered throughout the scene
Floating magical green particles scattered throughout the scene

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a densely wooded forest at night, with tall trees enclosing the path on both sides. Glowing green wisps float in the air providing faint illumination, while the starry sky remains mostly hidden by the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with visible night sky

events.description: forest opens up revealing expansive starry night sky overhead
large rock formation comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the forest opens up, revealing the starry sky and approaching a large rock formation

entered.detail: Large boulder or rock outcrop appearing on the right side of the path
Clear night sky filled with visible stars becoming prominent overhead

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as Geralt walks forward, revealing a beautiful starry night sky overhead. The path continues through more scattered trees, and a large rock formation appears on the right side while the dense tree line recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest edge with magical lighting

events.description: character turns completely around to face the camera briefly before continuing forward
distant rocky outcrop with blue magical glow becomes visible through the trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns to face the camera momentarily, then continues walking toward rocky terrain with glowing blue light in the distance

entered.detail: Rocky hillside or cliff face emitting an ethereal blue magical light visible through the trees
Large rocks and boulders scattered along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt briefly turns to face the camera before continuing forward through a more open rocky area. A large rock formation passes behind as the character approaches a distant rocky outcrop glowing with blue magical light, while the forest becomes sparser.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching magical rocky destination

events.description: blue magical glow from rocky outcrop becomes more prominent in the distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily toward the glowing rocky outcrop, navigating through the forest terrain

entered.detail: Thick underbrush and smaller trees filling in the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues walking through the forest toward the distant blue-glowing rocky outcrop. The path winds through dense vegetation with trees closing in on both sides, while the magical blue light remains visible ahead through the forest canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a wide, celestial landscape. It begins with Geralt walking through a densely wooded area where tall trees enclose the path and glowing green wisps provide the only faint illumination. As he moves forward, the oppressive canopy begins to thin, allowing the hidden starry sky to reveal itself overhead. The scene then expands as the dense tree line recedes into the background, shifting the environment toward a more open terrain. Finally, the path clears further to reveal a large rock formation on the right under the brilliance of the night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sparse rocky clearing that gradually transitions into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with Geralt briefly turning toward the camera before moving forward past a large rock formation toward a distant outcrop glowing with blue magical light. As the character advances, the open terrain shifts into a narrower path where the forest becomes increasingly thick. The scene then closes in as dense vegetation and towering trees flank both sides, though the magical blue glow remains visible through the overhead canopy.
